text_block_list.text:
I find myself at the pool in the middle of the night
as per Agnes Tachyon's instructions...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Tonight's experiment is to examine the movement
of muscles when water pressure is doubled!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't want us to get caught in the act,
would you? My plan is to introduce this special
chemical solution into the pool.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon, we'll be fine as long as we get rid of
the evidence by tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get started! Make sure you time it
properly!

Agnes Tachyon begins swimming with great
enthusiasm. From the looks of it, there doesn't
seem to be any change in the water.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Nothing seems different. I suppose the ratio of chemical solution to water was too low.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh well. Trainer, I'm leaving the rest to you. We
don't want the chemical to cause any problems
later on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The pool water will be recycled, but that doesn't
take care of what's splashed onto the floors and
railing and such.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Clean up and destroy the evidence. And be very
thorough with it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! But I need to go reflect on the failure...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Fine. Just stop looking at me like that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: First, my experiment fails, then I have to clean up after it... talk about a real mess!

Despite Agnes Tachyon's complaints, the strength
she's gained from the swim proves that this wasn't
complete a waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Clean up and destroy the evidence. And be very
thorough with it.
choice_data_list: I can't finish all this by myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Mm... good point. There's not enough time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And I'd like to avoid a lecture course for sure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I guess I should help you in that case... I hope
you're grateful!

Though Agnes Tachyon looks a bit tired, the
strength she's gained from the swim proves that
this wasn't complete a waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Clean up and destroy the evidence. And be very
thorough with it.
choice_data_list: Why don't you try a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no point, it's meaningless. Unfortunately,
as you can see, the water—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! This... The water feels more resistant than
before!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea the density of water could change
so drastically... Perhaps, my exercising in it was
the trigger...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, this is very interesting! Come on, Trainer! You should try as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her state of excitement, she suddenly pulls me
into the pool.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No way! What an incredible result! To think I was
ready to ignore such a valuable contributor to my
research!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Nice work, Trainer! Looks like you got a good
workout too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon appears truly elated. Collapsed
by her side, I muster a weak nod.
